description: Lume is a real estate agency in Campinas, Brazil, focused on residential property sales and rentals, with editorial neighborhood and local-place content on its site. Its website presents property listings, agents, blog content, and neighborhood guides.
summary: Lume exposes one public MCP server at `https://www.lumeimobiliaria.com.br/api/mcp/public` with SSE transport and no authentication; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found.
